reviews.comment:
te hacen demorar mucho para cargar nafta y se complica formar la fila x que la tenes q hacer sobre beiro y se confunden los autos q están estacionados sobre la avenida y los q están haciendo la fila.

(Translated by Google)
They make you wait a long time to fill up with gas and it's complicated to form the line because you have to do it on Beiro and the cars that are parked on the avenue get confused with those that are in line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdnJPY0h3EAE

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena y se nota porque siempre está lleno! Que tenga el ACA es un Plus en el servicio. El aire es gratis, la contra es que queda atrás de los surtidores y hay que dar unas volteretas extrañas. Igual no tienen problema y te dan una mano! Si sos del ACA aprovechá el descuento en el Market!

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent, and it shows because it's always packed! Being an ACA member is a real plus. Air conditioning is free, but the downside is that it's behind the gas pumps, so you have to navigate a bit awkwardly. But they're always happy to help! If you're an ACA member, take advantage of the discount at the Market!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OE9xZ0V3EAE
